hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *.py ]]; then uv run ruff format "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi
FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *.rs ]]; then . "$HOME/.cargo/env" && uv run maturin develop 2>/dev/null; fi
